channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] .self: A new top-level domain designed to support self-hosting
item.description: .self: A new top-level domain designed to support self-hosting

item.title: [Hacker News] Ornith-1.0: self-improving open-source models for agentic coding
item.description: Ornith-1.0: self-improving open-source models for agentic coding

item.title: [Hacker News] Qwen 3.6 27B is the sweet spot for local development
item.description: Qwen 3.6 27B is the sweet spot for local development

item.title: [Simon Willison] Ornith-1.0: Self-Scaffolding LLMs for Agentic Coding
item.description: Ornith-1.0: Self-Scaffolding LLMs for Agentic Coding

item.title: [GitHub Trending] 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence — 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council
item.description: GitHub project uses 18 AI personas across multiple LLM providers for structured deliberation on complex decisions.

item.title: [Hacker News] Tidal AI Policy
item.description: Tidal AI Policy

item.title: [Meta AI] From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery
item.description: From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/msitarzewski — A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
item.description: GitHub project offers a framework of specialized AI agents designed for tasks including frontend development, community engagement, and content verification.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/logto-io — 🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.
item.description: Logto provides authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI applications, supporting OIDC, OAuth 2.1, multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw — 基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。
item.description: VulnClaw automates penetration testing workflows using AI agents and LLMs, completing information gathering, vulnerability discovery, exploitation, and report generation from natural language input.

item.title: [Hacker News] The CEO of Mullvad is the main financer of the Swedish Örebro party
item.description: The CEO of Mullvad is the main financer of the Swedish Örebro party

item.title: [OpenAI] Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
item.description: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity

item.title: [Hacker News] Herdr: Agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal
item.description: Herdr: Agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Formalizing Latent Thoughts: Four Axioms of Thought Representation in LLMs
item.description: Researchers propose four axioms for evaluating latent thought representations in LLMs; testing finds all models fail at least one axiom and encode minimal unique information.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Position: The Term "Machine Unlearning" Is Overused in LLMs
item.description: Machine unlearning is overused in LLM research and should be reserved for dataset-defined deletion rather than conflating distinct tasks like alignment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Survey of Automated Presentation Coaching: Systems, Methods, and Open Challenges
item.description: Survey of automated presentation coaching systems covering pronunciation, prosody, and fluency assessment with a five-dimensional task taxonomy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Causal Connections: Leveraging Multilingual Fine-Tuning for Financial QA@FinCausal 2026
item.description: GPT-4.1 Mini fine-tuned on multilingual financial data achieves top performance for extracting cause-effect relations in English and Spanish QA.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Developmental approach reveals the statistical learning of Neural Language Models: Transformers generalize from the most abstract statistical patterns
item.description: Transformers learn abstract statistical patterns before local dependencies, with initial over-generalizations gradually constrained throughout the training process.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Supersede: Diagnosing and Training the Memory-Update Gap in LLM Agents
item.description: LLM agents fail to update facts correctly with bounded memory, with accuracy dropping from 92% to 77%; the gap is trainable.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Context-Ready Transformer
item.description: Context-Ready Transformer pre-contextualizes tokens via correction networks, achieving standard transformer performance with fewer layers and significantly faster inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EntMTP: Accelerating LLM Inference with Entropy Guided Multi Token Prediction
item.description: EntMTP accelerates LLM inference by dynamically adjusting multi-token prediction depth based on local generation entropy, achieving 1.15-1.36x speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Ko-WideSearch: A Korean Breadth-Search Benchmark for Exhaustive Set Enumeration by Web Agents
item.description: Ko-WideSearch, a Korean breadth-search benchmark, measures web agents' ability to exhaustively enumerate sets and complete attribute tables.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Narrative-UFET: Narrative Generation for Ultra-Fine Entity Typing
item.description: Narrative-UFET improves ultra-fine entity typing for long-tail types by using automatically generated multi-sentence narratives instead of sentence-level context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Masked Language Flow Models
item.description: Masked Language Flow Models combine masking with continuous flows to enable fast parallel generation while supporting multi-step reasoning tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cross-Platform Chinese Offensive Comment Detection via Dual-Threshold Hard Example Mining
item.description: Researchers propose dual-threshold hard example mining to improve cross-platform offensive comment detection for Chinese social media.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Yuvion LLM: An Adversarially-Aware Large Language Model for Content And AI Safety
item.description: Yuvion LLM focuses on adversarial safety using adversarially-aware data construction, continued pretraining, and policy-grounded multi-task safety post-training with reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Search Agents Should Ask: DiscoBench for Clarification-Aware Deep Search
item.description: DiscoBench benchmarks whether search agents can detect query ambiguity and ask clarification questions to improve multi-step reasoning in complex tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Signals to Transfer: A Factorised Study of Probe-Based Uncertainty Estimation in Large Language Models
item.description: Research systematically evaluates probe-based uncertainty estimation for LLMs, finding raw hidden states work in-domain but compressed features excel under distribution shift.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mitigating LLM-based p-Hacking by Preregistering for the Next LLM
item.description: Preregistration protocol for LLM experiments using future models prevents p-hacking in approximately 73-74% of test cases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mitigating Position Bias in Transformers via Layer-Specific Positional Embedding Scaling
item.description: Researchers propose layer-specific positional embedding scaling using genetic algorithms to address the lost-in-the-middle problem in LLMs, achieving up to 11.2% accuracy gains on long-context tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Low-Agreeableness Persona Conditioning for Safe LLM Fine-Tuning
item.description: Low-agreeableness persona conditioning improves LLM safety against jailbreaks while maintaining conversational warmth during fine-tuning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do Speech Emphasis Models Generalize across Languages and Emotions?
item.description: Multilingual training improves speech emphasis detection across languages and emotions compared to monolingual models, per new MMEE corpus study.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Enhancing Numerical Prediction in LLMs via Smooth MMD Alignment
item.description: SMMD training loss improves LLM numerical accuracy by using value-distance kernels to align predictions instead of treating numeric tokens as categories.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] KG2Cypher: Data-Centric Pipeline for Building Enterprise Text-to-Cypher Systems
item.description: KG2Cypher develops a data-centric pipeline for building natural-language interfaces to enterprise knowledge graphs, achieving 95.2% exact match on text-to-Cypher translation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Output-Space Allocation Costs for Calibration-Guided LLM Compression: An Empirical Study
item.description: Research examines output-space allocation costs versus weight-space for LLM compression; shows 0.8 percentage point accuracy gain but 16% perplexity increase on Qwen3-8B.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SHIFT: Gate-Modulated Activation Steering for Knowledge Conflict Mitigation in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description: SHIFT uses learnable gate modulation to resolve knowledge conflicts in RAG systems by adaptively regulating LLM internal activations with minimal trainable parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NLL-Guided Full-Attention Layer Selection for Training-Free Sliding-Window Adaptation
item.description: Training-free NLL-guided selection determines which layers retain full attention in hybrid models for efficient long-context inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Position Bias Correction is Insufficient for One-Pass Attention Sorting
item.description: Position-bias correction alone is insufficient for one-pass attention sorting to match iterative performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Learning Complementary Action Modeling from Automotive Maintenance Instructions
item.description: New approach identifies procedural counterparts of automotive maintenance instructions by modifying single action phrases while preserving context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Study of Temporal Fusion Strategies for Named Entity Recognition in Historical Texts
item.description: Late fusion strategies for embedding temporal metadata outperform early fusion in named entity recognition tasks on historical texts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Triadic Werewolf: A Jester Role for Multi-Hop Theory of Mind in LLMs
item.description: Theory-of-mind evaluation using three-faction Werewolf with Jester role shows DeepSeek excels at multi-agent reasoning while GPT-4.1 makes self-defeating moves.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VASAE: Naming SAE Dictionary Directions with Vocabulary-Aligned Anchoring
item.description: Vocabulary-Aligned Sparse Autoencoders (VASAE) align learned features to token embeddings during training, automatically naming dictionary directions without sacrificing reconstruction quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] An Empirical Analysis of Factual Errors in Human-Written Text and its Application
item.description: Empirical analysis of factual errors in human-written text reveals LLMs struggle with detection, achieving only 52% F1 score.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OverFlowLight: Real-Time Gridlock Prevention and Traffic Signal Optimization for Urban Intersections
item.description: OverFlowLight uses multi-modal sensing and hybrid rule-based/RL control to prevent queue overflow at urban intersections, reducing overflow 60.4% and increasing throughput 18.2%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RANSAC Scoring Done Right
item.description: RANSAC scoring method analytically marginalizes inlier scale, removing manual parameter dependence and improving robustness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Unified Zero-Shot Time Series Forecasting: A Darts Foundation
item.description: Darts adds unified support for multiple foundation models, standardizing zero-shot and fine-tuned time series forecasting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PairSAE: Mechanistic Interpretability from Pair Representations in Protein Co-Folding
item.description: Researchers introduce PairSAE, a method using sparse autoencoders to interpret pairwise representations in protein co-folding foundation models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning in Markovian bandits with non-observable states and constrained decision epochs
item.description: UCB-NOM achieves near-logarithmic regret in Markovian bandits with non-observable states, with bounds independent of the underlying state space dimensionality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Prism Transformer: Progressive Head Schedules for Hierarchical Attention Processing
item.description: Prism Transformer replaces uniform multi-head attention with progressive head schedules that increase head count across layers while maintaining parameter and computational efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Operator Learning for Cubic Nonlinear Schr\"odinger Equation on Periodic Domains
item.description: Fourier neural operator with geometry conditioning learns solution dynamics of cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equation on 2D tori with different aspect ratios.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Curse of Multiple Mediators: Hidden Interaction Effects in Activation Patching
item.description: Activation patching estimates contain interaction effects measuring how each component's causal effect depends on other components' states.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Boundary condition fidelity for bottom-hole pressure and CO2 plume prediction in geological carbon storage
item.description: Study evaluates boundary condition treatments for predicting bottom-hole pressure and CO2 migration in geological carbon storage, finding corner pore volume conservation critical for accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Productionized Fairness Measurement Under Privacy Constraints
item.description: Privacy-preserving fairness measurement method for race/ethnicity demographics using encryption and differential privacy, with framework applicable to other institutions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantum Generative Diffusion Model for Real-World Time Series
item.description: Quantum diffusion model QDiffusion-TS reduces time series synthesis parameters by ~1000x, achieving 44% lower Wasserstein distance and 71% improved forecasting versus classical models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] hia-gat: A Heterogeneous Interaction-Aware Graph Attention Network For Frame-Level Traffic Conflict Risk Prediction On Freeways
item.description: A heterogeneous graph attention network models vehicle interactions on freeways to predict traffic conflict risk with interpretable conflict-type attribution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PEBS: Per-rater Empirical-Bayes Shrinkage for RLHF Reward-Model Calibration
item.description: PEBS uses per-rater empirical-Bayes shrinkage to calibrate individual annotator preferences in RLHF reward models, improving RMSE by 8-10%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Retroactive Advantage Correction: Closed-Form V-Trace Bias Correction for Delay-Aware RLHF
item.description: Retroactive Advantage Correction handles delayed rewards in production RLHF by queuing completions and reinjecting them, reducing policy bias versus waiting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Global Explanations for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting Models via $K$-Order Markov Approximations
item.description: KARMA constructs Markov surrogate models to explain time-series forecasting predictors by capturing temporal dependencies, outperforming methods like TimeSHAP.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Training Observable Control Policies to Expose Agent State Through Actions
item.description: Reinforcement learning trains observable control policies that enable state estimation through agent actions when direct communication is unavailable.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] COOPA: A Modular LLM Agent Architecture for Operations Research Problems
item.description: COOPA, a modular LLM-agent system for operations research, uses confidence-based modeling and multi-solver routing to improve decision support accuracy by up to 6.7 percentage points.
